values.content:
=Classify this email into exactly one category:
- URGENT (needs immediate attention)
- REPLY_NEEDED (requires a response but not urgent)
- FYI (informational, no action needed)
- RECEIPTS (order confirmations, invoices, bank statements, subscription charges)
- NEWSLETTER (newsletters, marketing emails, subscription content)
- JUNK (spam or unwanted)

Then write one short sentence summarizing the email.

From: {{ $json.from }}
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Preview: {{ $json.bodyPreview }}

Reply in EXACTLY this format with nothing else:
CATEGORY|One sentence summary
